about.pageDescription: We're a passionate team of developers, designers, and innovators dedicated to building exceptional software solutions.

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: Founded in 2019, Atrina was born from a simple belief: that exceptional software should be accessible to everyone. What started as a small team of passionate developers has grown into a full-service software company serving clients worldwide.
story.paragraph2: Our journey has been driven by our commitment to excellence and innovation. We've had the privilege of working with startups, scale-ups, and established enterprises, helping them transform their ideas into reality through cutting-edge technology solutions.
story.paragraph3: Today, we're proud to be a trusted partner for businesses looking to leverage technology for growth. Our team combines deep technical expertise with creative problem-solving to deliver solutions that not only meet requirements but exceed expectations.

values.title: Excellence
values.description: We strive for perfection in every line of code and every pixel of design.
